firmware.title: NE2217_11_A.10 is available
firmware.description:
New version: NE2217_11_A.10

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

• Android security patch upgraded to December, 2022

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting January 7, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

New version: NE2217_11_C.26

This release includes the following:

•Enable VoNR

If you choose not to do so now, the update will take place AUTOMATICALLY between 12AM and 6AM starting March 11, 2023. Data rates may apply. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.

firmware.title: NE2215_14.0.0.600(EX01)  is available
firmware.description:
New version: NE2215_14.0.0.600(EX01) System

 • You can now press and hold the Volume Down button to turn the torch on when the screen is off.

• Adds a "Partial screenshot" option in the Smart Sidebar.

 • You can now create photo collages without frames in Photos.

 • You can now try out the "app-specific volume" feature to adjust the volume for individual apps based on your needs.

 • You can now use fingerprint unlock without waking up the screen.

• Improves system performance and stability.

 • Integrates the March 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: NE2215_11.F.77 is available
firmware.description:
New Version Available: NE2215_11.F.77_2770_202411011916

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

•  Adds the feature of setting the default alarm sound in "Clock" for all alarms in a unified manner.

• Adds a module to Trinity Engine to optimize apps after system updates, speeding up app launches and reducing power consumption.

• Integrates the November 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

 Automatic Update Schedule:

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on April 20th, 2025.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 911.

firmware.title: NE2211_15.0.0.700(EX01)  is available
firmware.description:
New version:NE2211_15.0.0.700(EX01) 

This update improves system security.

 System

• Adds an option to rename an app group by touching and holding its shortcut on the Home screen.

• The dock can now display 5 apps even when the Home screen is set to display 4 apps per row.

• Improves system stability and performance.

• Improves the animation for notifications and Quick Settings for a smoother experience.

• Integrates the March 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

• Fixes a display issue with the Lock screen.

Communication & interconnection

• Improves the music player controls in Live Alerts for Spotify.

• Improves Wi-Fi network switching and mobile data roaming for a more seamless experience.

• Improves Wi-Fi connectivity for a smoother experience when watching live streams in TikTok making video calls on WeChat.

• Fixes an issue where sound doesn't work when using LHDC codec with Bluetooth headphones.

Security & privacy

• Improves the process for resetting your privacy password. You will be prompted to link to your privacy password to your account. If you forget your privacy password, you can use your account to reset your password and regain access to your private data.

Camera

• Adds support for live photos, which allows you to capture a short video clip and bring your photos to life.

firmware.title: NE2215_15.0.0.901(EX01) is available
firmware.description:
New Version Available: NE2215_15.0.0.901(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

Interconnection

You can now connect your phone to your Mac. You can now view your phone files on your Mac and transfer files between the devices.

Apps

Adds partial screen recording. You can now select a specific area of the screen to record, instead of capturing the entire screen.

System

Adds new clock widgets. The clock widgets can be added to your Home screen, with options to display current weather conditions and local time.

Setting a custom ringtone while adding or editing a contact is now easier.

Enhances gesture recognition for closing floating windows; improves shadow effects around floating windows.

Improves the responsiveness of fingerprint unlock.

Reduces power consumption to extend battery life.

Integrates the May 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 911.
